# calendarUnits

**Instance Property**

The calendar units to include in the formatted string.

## Declaration

```swift
var calendarUnits: NSCalendar.Unit { get set }
```

## Discussion

For a list of supported units, see [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKRelativeDateTextProvider#Date-Format-Options].

## Getting the Date Information

- **date**: The target date to use for calculations.
- **relativeToDate**: The end date that the text provider uses when calculating a fixed, relative date.
- **relativeDateStyle**: The formatting style to use for the relative time value.
